indicators.name: Dining Table
indicators.rationale: The dining table is too large and obstructs the space, making it difficult to move around.

indicators.name: Red Chairs
indicators.rationale: The red chairs are too close together, limiting the space available for computer work.

indicators.name: Rug
indicators.rationale: The rug is too large and covers most of the floor, making it difficult to move around.

reasoning_summary: The space is not suitable for computer work (solo) due to the large dining table, close chairs, and large rug occupying the floor space.
